title: Infinizoom
description: Infinite zoom and ultrawide FOV mod
body:
Zoom in infinitely for precision work, building, or just checking out tiny details up close. On the flip side, zoom out to an insane 179-degree field of view for shits & giggles.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uw0nzWYQ0Kk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Features:
- Infinite zoom depth — no limit, zoom as far as your heart desires
- Ultra-wide FOV up to 179 degrees for panoramic views
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Works great in survival, creative, and adventure modes

Perfect for builders, explorers, or anyone who wants more control over their viewing experience. Made because I couldn't find a mod that did exactly this, so I built it myself.

Feel free to use this in modpacks, just give credit where it's due. Hope you enjoy! 😘
